'''Swee-beeps''' was the [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] great-uncle of convicted killer [[Ree-Yees/Legends|Ree-Yees]]. He supposedly taught him "culinary resusperation": "[[Smelling salt]]s so powerful, it bring the dead back to life!"

{{Char-stub}}
